$comment: c89 (D-CSUBSET-SIZEOF-VALUE-OPERAND-TYPE, 2026-07-02): `sizeof <value-expr>` with an OPERATOR in the operand sizes the expression's RESULT type (C 6.5.3.4), not the first stamped leaf below it. Pre-fix Pass 2 left operator nodes unstamped and lowerSizeof's resolveStampedTypeBelow DFS hit the base identifier: sizeof(*p)=8 (the pointer), sizeof(tab[0])=the WHOLE array, ArraySize=1. THE sqlite run-green detonation: pthreadMutexAlloc allocated 8 bytes for the 40-byte recursive mutex -> glibc's mutex-init writes clobbered the malloc top -> sysmalloc SIGABRT on every invocation. FIX: the Pass-2 sizeofValueRule arm stamps the operand via subtreeType. 15 rows, each a DISTINCT exit code naming its shape (deref/index/whole-array/element/ArraySize/member/arrow/address-of/binary/bare). RED-ON-DISABLE (audit-witnessed): revert the stamp -> rows 1/2/4/5/6/11 mis-size (rows 8/13 coincide pre-fix). => 42.
